title: Butler chunk task
description: Logical shape of a chunk — a child task (one focused sitting) under a parent work unit. The agent builds this, then maps it onto TickTick fields per references/template.md. Real subtask (parentId), never a checklist item, so it can carry its own dates/reminders/focus estimate.

id.description: Stable local id used by the packer and to link a verify chunk to its build chunk.

title.description: Imperative verb + concrete object + optional done-signal, sentence case. No gerund, no ticket prefix, no emoji, no trailing period. Code identifiers verbatim. See task-contract.md.

mode.description: Energy axis (the one TickTick mode tag). Drives packer ordering.

chunk_type.description: Calibration + AI-discount taxonomy axis. Durable; stored in the est0 line. Grouped by this for reference-class estimation over time.

ai_discount.description: discounted = AI compresses this (scaffold/wire on understood code, crud, boilerplate test, mechanical refactor, codemod). none/premium = AI does not reliably help and may slow you (ambiguous-spec resolution, cross-system trace/debug, decisions needing people, reviewing AI output). A `discounted` build chunk MUST have a paired verify chunk.

est0_min.description: IMMUTABLE original focus-minute estimate, written once at first scheduling and never overwritten on reschedule. The anchor for calibration (compare against actual focus time).

priority.description: Commitment tag, set only when the chunk is scheduled for the target day; null otherwise.

why.description: One line, only if not obvious from the title.

ref.description: PR / issue / ticket URL or id where deep context lives.

scheduled.description: True only for the target day's chunks. Scheduled chunks get start/due, timeZone, reminder, and a pomo estimate; all others stay dateless.

block.description: From the packer output; maps to TickTick startDate/dueDate.

verify_of.description: If set, this is the auto-paired verify chunk for the build chunk with this id. Verify chunks are mode=review, ai_discount=none, chunk_type=review.

parent_ticket.description: The parent work unit's ticket (or a local ref when there is no ticket). Resolved to TickTick parentId at write time.
